svg.text: Training on another model's reasoning hurts GPQA more

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: than training on the student's own reasoning

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

svg.text: Top row shows capability cost. Bottom row checks whether the trait still installs.
